description: Sample questions demonstrating both single-select and multi-select functionality.

questions.questionText: Which of the following are primary components of Adobe Experience Manager?

options.explanation: AEM Sites is the web content management component.
AEM Assets is the digital asset management component.
AEM Forms provides form creation and management capabilities.
Photoshop is a separate Adobe product, not part of AEM.

questions.questionText: What is the primary purpose of AEM Dispatcher?

options.optionText: To provide caching and load balancing
options.explanation: AEM Dispatcher is primarily used for caching and load balancing to improve performance.

questions.questionText: Which of these are valid AEM author instance actions?

options.explanation: Authors can create new pages in AEM.
Content editing is a primary author function.
Authors can publish content from the author instance.
Author instances are not meant to serve live traffic - that's the publish instance role.
